case_title: KOENIGSBERG, ELEC vs. MARTINEZ, JODY et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOENIGSBERG, ELEC AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, JODY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KOENIGSBERG, ELEC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, JODY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 639 BUSH ST #32, LEASE FORFEITED, NOTATION RENDERED ON ORIGINAL LEASE PER CRC 522
